extortion.description: Com-Tec Communications specializes in structured network cabling and offers tailored technology solutions for businesses in OrangeCounty and Lake Forest, California. Their services include telecom VOIP, surveillance systems, Wi-Fi improvements, network infrastructure, and audio-visual enhancements to boost productivity andsecurity.We will upload 70gb of corporate data soon. Employee files (passport and DL scans, i-9 forms and so on), specifications and projects, financials, confidential files, HR files, client and partner files, NDAs, etc.
